result: The NS-SEC occupational class variables have been cleaned and harmonised according to the specified rules. The process included loading the datasets from `data/input/`, merging them by `NSID`, collapsing fractional NS-SEC categories using `floor()`, mapping wave-specific missing codes to a standard scheme, deriving the full-time student category for age 25 using economic activity data, and converting the final variables to labelled factors. The resulting dataset containing `NSID` and the six age-specific NS-SEC variables (`nssec17`, `nssec18`, `nssec19`, `nssec20`, `nssec25`, `nssec32`) has been saved to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
